The Secret Survey

THE SECRET SURVEY
Topic Progress:
In this lesson, I'll teach you how to learn more about your customers without having
them knowing. I'll show you how to track your users to collect information with the goal
of sending them high quality and specific content. It's not as sketchy as it sounds, I
promise!
ACTION ITEM
Figure out how you can best collect information on your users and then create your
first Secret Survey.
